summary: Phase 1 frontend-only smoke test completed across all 6 steps (/ratio, /brand, /script, /analysis, /preview, /export). All required data-testids resolve, navigation/pager works, localStorage persistence verified, mock render completes and download button appears. Sidebar marks completed steps with checks, progress bar updates correctly (17% on step 1, 100% on step 6). One real console error found: nested <button> inside <button> in SceneEditorCard (scene-edit-* nested inside scene-card-*) producing a React hydration validation warning.

ui_bugs.issue: Nested interactive elements: scene-edit-${id} <button> is rendered as a descendant of scene-card-${id} <button>. Produces React DOM validation warning: 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>. This will cause a hydration error.' Although stopPropagation prevents functional bug, it violates HTML spec and may cause hydration mismatches.

action_items: Refactor SceneEditorCard.jsx: convert the outer scene-card-${id} wrapper from <button> to <div role="button" tabIndex={0} onClick={...} onKeyDown={...}> (or move the inner scene-edit button outside the card and overlay it via absolute positioning). Keep all data-testid attributes intact.
critical_code_review_comments: SceneEditorCard.jsx (line 15 + line 65): invalid HTML — nested <button> elements. Fix by promoting outer to a div with role=button.
ProjectContext.jsx: empty catch blocks silently swallow JSON parse / localStorage errors — fine for Phase 1 but consider console.warn for debuggability.
StepLayout.jsx: TopBar uses negative horizontal margins (-mx-10 lg:-mx-16) to stretch full-width inside a padded parent — works visually but is fragile if padding values change.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase-1 acceptance criteria verified via Playwright: root->/ratio redirect, 4 ratio cards selectable, sidebar with 6 steps + check marks on visited steps, progress bar (17% step1, 100% step6), prev disabled on step 1, brand name/logo/preview live update, 5 color pickers + 2 font selectors with 6 font options each, both brand-reset-button and brand-quick-reset present, script-sample-button populates textarea (66 words / 381 chars / est. 26s), analysis page renders 3 headlines + keywords-list + broll-grid b1-b4, preview-stage with transport controls (play/volume/fullscreen) toggles, 4 scene cards with scene-properties update on click, 3 export presets selectable, mock render completes in ~5s and export-download-button appears, localStorage 'broll.studio.v1' persists ratio + brand.brandName across reload. Only one console error: nested <button> in SceneEditorCard. Skipped: real-time visual contrast audit of every glassmorphism surface; transitions/animations not timed.
rca of the issue: SceneEditorCard.jsx wraps the entire card body in <button type='button'> for selection (data-testid=scene-card-${id}) and ALSO contains a secondary <button> (data-testid=scene-edit-${id}) inside it for the wand/edit action. HTML spec forbids interactive descendants inside <button>; React 18+ logs a console error. Reproduction: navigate to /preview — the warning appears immediately. Mitigation: convert outer wrapper to <div role='button' tabIndex={0}> with explicit onClick and onKeyDown(Enter/Space).
